title: OCS/GCS qconf execution host schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -se / -Me: an execution host definition. load_values are read-only runtime values reported by the host; they are shown but ignored on modify.

hostname.description: Execution host name (or 'global' for the global host).

load_values.description: Read-only load/resource values reported by the host (shown, ignored on modify).

processors.description: Number of processors of the host.

user_lists.description: Access lists allowed to use the host.

xuser_lists.description: Access lists denied use of the host.

projects.description: Projects allowed to use the host.

xprojects.description: Projects denied use of the host.

report_variables.description: Load/consumable variable names to include in reporting.
